news.headline: Nothing Bundt Cakes recognized as the fifth-fastest-growing brand in America by Yelp, with a growth of nearly 20% in 2024.
news.summary: In 2024, the country's biggest specialty cake company experienced a growth of close to 20%. Nothing Bundt Cakes, based in Dallas, has further established its position as a leading American brand. It has been acknowledged as Yelp's fifth Fastest Growing company.

news.headline: Crescent Real Estate LLC in Fort Worth, Texas promotes several key members of its team for exceptional performance.
news.summary: In Fort Worth, Texas, on March 20, 2025, Crescent Real Estate LLC (Crescent) has revealed the promotion of multiple crucial team members. These promotions highlight the individuals' dedication and outstanding work that have significantly contributed to Crescent's achievements. The promotions demonstrate Crescent's commitment to recognizing talent within the company.

news.headline: JPMorgan sees growth potential in CAVA as Yum! Brands plans expansion. Industry supply growth up 12%. CAVA's price target now $110.
news.summary: JPMorgan recently pointed out that despite the recent fluctuation in restaurant chain stocks, there are opportunities to be found. Although consumer confidence has declined, leading to more cautious spending habits, the overall industry supply growth has proven resilient, increasing by 12% from the third quarter of 2018 to the third quarter of 2024, with a compound annual growth rate of approximately 2%. Analyst John Ivankoe specifically upgraded the rating of CAVA Group Inc (NYSE:CAVA) from Neutral to Overweight, setting a price target of $110. According to Ivankoe, CAVA Group has ample room for expansion in the U.S. market due to its previous success in multiple markets. The company is seeing early generation of free cash flows and has immediate growth strategies in place.

news.headline: Kevin O'Leary predicts reversal of bearish trend in crypto market amid US trade war. Expects Bitcoin to rise due to regulatory clarity for stablecoins. Watch the interview for more insights. #BTC #crypto
news.summary: The crypto market is experiencing pressure due to the US-China trade war and global economic conditions. Analysts suggest a bear market may be approaching. Kevin O’Leary remains positive on Bitcoin’s future despite the challenges, expecting it to rise by year-end. He emphasizes the importance of regulatory clarity, particularly with stablecoins like the GENIUS Act, which could provide stability and legitimize the market. O’Leary also discusses his diversified crypto portfolio. Watch the full interview for more insights on his views. Trump's comments hint at the US becoming a significant player in the Bitcoin space.

news.headline: Bending Spoons buys komoot, Germany's route-planning platform. 45M users acquired by the technology company.
news.summary: Tech firm Bending Spoons recently finalized the purchase of komoot, a German route-planning platform catering to global adventurers and outdoor lovers. Markus Hallermann, the CEO and co-founder of komoot, expressed satisfaction with the acquisition. Over the span of 17 years, komoot progressed from its inception in student quarters to amassing a user base of 45 million individuals. This development aligns with komoot’s core goal of democratizing outdoor escapades for everyone.

news.headline: Eoin Tinney of Howry, Breen & Herman in Austin joins "Top 40 Under 40 Civil Plaintiff Trial Lawyers in Texas."
news.summary: Eoin Tinney, a legal professional at Howry, Breen & Herman, LLP in Austin, Texas, has been recognized as one of the "Top 40 Under 40 Civil Plaintiff Trial Lawyers in Texas" by The National Trial Lawyers. This prestigious group comprises outstanding attorneys recognized for their proficiency in handling civil plaintiff cases. Tinney's membership in this esteemed list highlights his exceptional legal skills and dedication to his practice. The announcement was made in Austin, Texas, on March 20, 2025.

news.headline: Johnson Pump helps deliver fresh water underground to Ameland, Netherlands during peak tourism season.
news.summary: Ameland, a popular destination in the Netherlands, depends on Johnson Pump from SPX FLOW to ensure a consistent water supply during its peak tourism season. This collaboration is vital for sustaining the island's freshwater needs. Johnson Pump, a reputable industrial pump brand, has been entrusted with this responsibility. This partnership highlights the significance of reliable water systems, especially when the island experiences a surge in visitors. By utilizing Johnson Pump's expertise, Ameland can meet the high demand for clean water efficiently.

news.headline: Academy Sports reports Q4 EPS beat at $1.96, sales of $1.676B (down 6.6%). Comp sales dip 3%. Plans to open 20-25 new stores in 2025.
news.summary: Academy Sports and Outdoors, Inc. (NASDAQ:ASO) announced its fourth-quarter performance with adjusted earnings per share standing at $1.96, surpassing the expected $1.83. However, the quarterly sales figure of $1.676 billion marked a 6.6% decrease from the previous year and fell just short of the anticipated $1.677 billion. Comparable sales dropped by 3% in the reviewed quarter, an improvement from the 3.6% decline in the same period last year. During Q4, Academy inaugurated five new stores, bringing the total new store count for 2024 to 16. Looking ahead to 2025, the company aims to open between 20 to 25 new stores. The adjusted net income for the quarter was reported at $138.8 million, indicating a 17.5% decline year over year. More details on the story are accessible on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: New green space, Freedom Plaza, to transform Manhattan with 5 acres of park and amenities. PRNewswire, March 20, 2025.
news.summary: Aiming to cater to the community's demand for additional public green areas, Freedom Plaza will provide around 5 acres of parkland and facilities open to the public. This initiative is set to transform Manhattan's East side and is part of a broader civic and cultural project. Scheduled for completion in 2025, this project is designed to enhance the quality of life in the neighborhood by providing ample outdoor spaces for residents to enjoy.

news.headline: Inventor from Sarnia, Ontario creates DANDY CANE for visually impaired; ensures visibility at night.
news.summary: A resident of Sarnia, Ontario, Canada, shared their innovative solution for visually impaired individuals in Pittsburgh on March 20, 2025. The inventor introduced the DANDY CANE, a cane designed to enhance user visibility, especially during nighttime. The new cane aims to address the safety concerns of visually impaired individuals by incorporating features that make them easily noticeable. This invention signals a milestone in assistive technology with the potential to benefit a significant number of people with visual impairments.

news.headline: TrewUp releases Sales Insights Dashboard for CPG brands, enhancing trade spend visibility and retailer tracking.
news.summary: On March 20, 2025, in Denver, TrewUp, a top provider of trade spend visibility and deductions management, unveiled its Sales Insights Dashboard. This innovative tool aims to assist brands in monitoring retailer performance, improving trade spend efficiency, and making informed decisions based on data. The dashboard is equipped with advanced features to enhance visibility and streamline management processes. This launch represents a significant advancement in the industry and highlights TrewUp's commitment to empowering brands with valuable insights.

news.headline: ConstructConnect wins 2025 Top Workplaces USA award, reaffirming its position in the construction industry.
news.summary: A software solutions provider for the construction sector, ConstructConnect, based in Cincinnati, has recently been honored with the prestigious 2025 Top Workplaces USA award. The accolade, bestowed by Energage, an organization focused on developing workforce solutions and enhancing corporate reputation, recognizes companies with exceptional workplace environments. As a notable player in the industry, ConstructConnect continues to excel, showcasing its commitment to employee satisfaction and professional growth.

news.headline: 47 counterparties take $192.64 bln at Fed Reverse Repo Operation.
Nvidia: We will open a quantum research lab in Boston. $NVDA
US Justice Department: AG Bondi announces severe charges against violent Tesla arsonists. $TSLA
WEBPRO is selling three rare domain names (LifeChanges.com, CompleteChanges.com, LifeCapsule.com) before auction due to their high value and scarcity.
news.summary: Charlotte, North Carolina, March 20, 2025 - With premium domain names becoming more scarce and valuable in the digital realm, three exceptional DOT-COM assets - LifeChanges.com, CompleteChanges.com, and LifeCapsule.com - are currently open for acquisition before their scheduled auction. These sought-after domains are rare finds in today's competitive market.

news.headline: Vote for your favorite dog breed in Royal Canin's superbracket competition to win prizes. ST. CHARLES, Mo, Mar 20, 2025 - ROYAL CANIN® U.S. offers breed-specific nutrition.
news.summary: Royal Canin is launching a superbracket competition to educate consumers on breed-specific nutrition. The company, based in St. Charles, Missouri, announced the initiative on March 20, 2025. Royal Canin is a major player in pet health nutrition and is part of Mars, a billion-dollar brand.

news.headline: USPS introduces tools to predict delivery times, saving $36 billion over 10 years. Enhancements start on April 1 and July 1.
news.summary: The United States Postal Service is providing customers with new tools and a fact sheet to assist in determining expected delivery times. This improvement will be made in two phases, with the first phase scheduled for April 1 and the second phase for July 1. These refinements are projected to result in savings of at least $36 billion for USPS over the course of 10 years. The announcement was made in Washington on March 20, 2025.

news.headline: Darktrace Federal secures FedRAMP® High Authority to Operate, empowering their AI cybersecurity platform to defend IT, OT, and email for the federal government.
news.summary: Darktrace Federal has recently obtained a new designation that will enhance its capacity to provide AI-driven defense solutions for IT, OT, and email services to the federal government. The designation was achieved on March 20, 2025, in Arlington, Virginia. This advancement will enable Darktrace Federal to deliver its services more effectively in the federal sector.

news.headline: Nanoscope Therapeutics appoints Ademola Daramola as VP Quality & Compliance to enhance gene therapy for vision restoration.
news.summary: On March 20, 2025, in Dallas, Nanoscope Therapeutics Inc., a biotechnology company, revealed its dedication to helping blind patients regain vision in everyday scenarios. They focus on creating and selling innovative gene therapies for retinal degenerative diseases. The company's recent announcement involved Ademola, indicating significant progress in this field.

news.headline: EaseUS releases AI PDF summarizer, EaseUS ChatPDF, for free. Users can summarize, ask questions, and extract data.
news.summary: A global software company named EaseUS, specializing in data recovery and disk management services, has unveiled a new AI-powered tool called EaseUS ChatPDF in March 2025. This innovative tool is designed to assist users in summarizing PDF documents, asking questions, and extracting data from uploaded files. Its features include capabilities to streamline information processing and enhance user productivity.

news.headline: Inventor from Oshawa, Ontario invents SKULL BATTZ, a versatile product with skull theme, aiming for attention.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on March 20, 2025, an inventor hailing from Oshawa, Ontario, Canada, shared their motivation behind creating a versatile product named SKULL BATTZ. With a keen interest in skulls, the inventor aimed to develop a multi-functional item that could cater to various preferences. The SKULL BATTZ is designed to capture attention through its unique features and can serve diverse purposes. This innovative product has the potential to attract a wide audience with an interest in skulls and beyond.

news.headline: Everstory Partners revolutionizes end-of-life services with tech advancements. Transformed from paper to software in under a year, 400 cemeteries go digital.
news.summary: Altamonte Springs, Florida - On March 20, 2025, Everstory Partners successfully transitioned its operations within a year, moving away from traditional paper maps and contracts to advanced software systems. The company, which oversees almost 400 cemetery sites, now provides digital services...

news.headline: Info-Tech Research Group launches 5-Day IT Management Accelerator Programs to assist IT leaders in driving transformation.
news.summary: Info-Tech Research Group recently announced the launch of its updated 5-Day IT Management Accelerator Programs. These programs are designed to offer IT leaders specialized, hands-on training catered to their individual roles. Through expert mentorship, interactive learning, and practical strategies, the programs aim to assist IT professionals in enhancing their skills and capabilities.

news.headline: Consumers Energy expands options for residential renewable energy, including income qualified customers, marking major commitments to clean energy future in Michigan.
news.summary: Consumers Energy revealed on March 20, 2025, that income eligible customers are now eligible to partake in Michigan's transition to clean energy. This announcement marks a significant step forward in the company's renewable energy goals. Residents and businesses in Michigan are encouraged to join this movement towards sustainability.

news.headline: Small businesses in the US are struggling with soaring health insurance costs, like FireflySci facing an increase of over $10,000 annually.
news.summary: FireflySci, a company based in Northport, New York, revealed the struggles it faces as its expenses skyrocket by more than $10,000 each year. Amidst a concerning trend, small businesses throughout the country are experiencing a significant increase in health insurance expenses. This surge poses a serious threat to the financial stability of these businesses.

news.headline: Dimora Medical tops Amazon's Wound Dressings category for 3rd year, with over 33 million sold since 2019 debut.
news.summary: Dimora Medical, a leading provider of premium medical care supplies, recently achieved top ranking in Amazon's Wound Dressings category for the third consecutive year. Since its introduction in 2019, the company has sold an impressive 33 million wound dressings, solidifying its position as an innovator in the industry.

news.headline: Armenian virtual domain Digital Julfa launched on Fastexverse, first virtual center in Dubai to open on June 23, 2025.
news.summary: Armenia's groundbreaking three-dimensional virtual platform, www.digitaljulfa.com, has been introduced on the metaverse. The inaugural virtual hub will be unveiled in Dubai on June 23, 2025. This innovative venture comes amid high anticipation for its potential impact, with New York serving as the launch location on March 20, 2025. Digital Julfa aims to revitalize Armenia's online presence and is poised to set new standards in the virtual realm.

news.headline: Study by Reveri shows 2/3 of population is hypnotizable; genetic findings give insight. Dr. Spiegel co-founded the self-hypnosis app.
news.summary: Research indicates that approximately 66% of the population has the ability to be hypnotized. An investigation into genetics has unveiled the reasons behind this phenomenon. A renowned self-hypnosis application called Reveri, created by Dr. David Spiegel, who is also the Associate Chair of Psychiatry at Stanford University, has brought attention to these findings.

news.headline: Stora Enso Oyj's AGM on March 20, 2025, adopted accounts for 2024, and made key decisions in Helsinki, Finland.
news.summary: Stora Enso Oyj held its Annual General Meeting on March 20, 2025 in Helsinki, Finland at the Marina Congress Center. The AGM approved the accounts for the year 2024 and also confirmed the Remuneration proposal. The company's Stock Exchange Release was issued on the same day at 18:35 EET.

news.headline: Turkey unexpectedly raised its overnight rate to 19% to support the struggling lira.
Wall Street steady as Berkshire Hathaway hits record highs. Fed Chair Powell downplays tariff inflation fears.Indices unchanged midday. Berkshire Hathaway extends rally with 6th positive session..
news.summary: On Thursday, U.S. stocks remained flat as investors processed Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell's comments on inflation and tariffs post the Federal Open Market Committee meeting. Powell minimized concerns of President Trump's tariffs causing inflation, labeling their impact as "transitory." However, the Fed's latest projections indicated slower economic growth, increasing unemployment, and higher inflation. Midday in New York, major indexes showed minimal changes, with financial stocks leading slight gains. Berkshire Hathaway Inc. (NYSE: BRK) continued its rally, hitting fresh record highs and heading for a sixth consecutive positive session. The stock has outperformed the S&P 500 year-to-date.

news.headline: Dow Jones up 150 points as Nvidia eyes opportunity; Cathie Wood buys fallen stocks. Markets fluctuate.
news.summary: Today, the Dow Jones saw an increase of 150 points as Nvidia stood out with a rise in the stock market. Contrastingly, Chinese stocks experienced a decline. Renowned investor Cathie Wood made noteworthy investments in undervalued stocks, showcasing her confidence in their potential growth. Overall, this indicates a positive trend in the market with significant movements in key indices and stock performances.

news.headline: Mezzan Holding announces FY2024 results. Leading Gulf manufacturer & distributor of food, beverage, FMCG, and pharmaceutical products.
news.summary: On March 20, 2025, Mezzan Holding KSC disclosed its fiscal year 2024 financial outcomes. The company, recognized as a significant player in the production and supply of food, beverage, FMCG, and pharmaceutical items in the Gulf area, shared this news. Mezzan Holding KSC traded on Bloomberg under the symbol MEZZAN.KK and on Reuters as MEZZ.KW.

news.headline: Darden Restaurants (Olive Garden parent) hits $3.158 billion in sales, up 6.2%, missing expectations, despite matching profit views. Uber deliveries expand.
news.summary: The parent company of Olive Garden, Darden Restaurants, reported profits in line with expectations, however, its sales of $3.158 billion increased by 6.2%, falling short of the projected $3.214 billion. Despite this, Darden Restaurants saw a positive response from investors during the quarter. Additionally, the company is expanding its services through Uber deliveries, which is expected to further contribute to its growth.

news.headline: Pfizer experiencing first-quarter slowdown; sales and earnings expected to decrease. Is it time to sell PFE stock?
news.summary: Is it time to sell Pfizer stock with projections showing a decline in first-quarter sales and earnings? Shareholders are pondering the question: is it advisable to sell PFE stock?

news.headline: Accenture's fiscal Q2 earnings meet estimates, raises revenue outlook; stock falls amid concerns over government business. ServiceNow also retreats.
news.summary: During the latest fiscal quarter, Accenture announced earnings and revenue slightly above expectations. The company has also raised the lower end of its annual revenue forecast. Following this news, Accenture's stock experienced a decline due to concerns about its government contracts. In addition, ServiceNow also saw a decrease in its stock value.

news.headline: Dump Trucks & Mining Trucks industry forecast predicts market size to reach $109.25B by 2033, growing at 8.05% CAGR.
news.summary: A report on the Dump Trucks & Mining Trucks Market indicates that the market size is projected to expand significantly. The market, currently valued at US$ 54.42 billion in 2024, is anticipated to reach US$ 109.25 billion by 2033. This growth represents a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 8.05% during the forecast period of 2025-2033. The surge in market size is attributed to the rising need for mining activities and infrastructure development.

US 10 Yr TIPS Auction
US 10-Year TIPS High Yield Actual 1.935% (Forecast -, Previous 2.243%)
IDG completes sale of Foundry to Regent, a private equity firm, marking a new era of growth and innovation.
news.summary: A recent announcement from International Data Group revealed the finalization of the sale of Foundry to Regent, a prominent global private equity firm.

news.headline: BNP Paribas Group released its Universal Registration Document & Annual Financial Report for 2024.
news.summary: English version of the annual financial report and universal registration document for the year 2024 has been made available. The document provides detailed information on the company's financial performance, including revenue, expenses, profits, and other key financial metrics for the year. It serves as a comprehensive overview of the company's operations and financial health. The release of this document is important for shareholders, investors, and other stakeholders to understand the company's performance and make informed decisions.

news.headline: Rimini Street receives Great Place to Work certifications & Leadership Award in multiple countries, including Israel, Japan, Singapore, UK, USA. CEO Seth Ravin awarded Korea's Most Respected CEO.
news.summary: Rimini Street, Inc., a prominent global provider of enterprise software support and innovation solutions, has recently been recognized for its exceptional workplace environment. The company, known for its third-party support services for Oracle, SAP, and VMware software, has received consecutive Great Place to Work® certifications in various countries such as Israel, Japan, Singapore, the UK, and the US. Additionally, Rimini Street's CEO, Seth Ravin, was honored with the prestigious Best Workplaces™ Korea’s Most Respected CEO award. The acknowledgment from Great Place to Work® emphasizes the company's commitment to providing a positive and rewarding work atmosphere for its employees.

news.headline: Spring Catalyst, a company enhancing business team optimization in the AI era, launched in SF today.
news.summary: In San Francisco, a company called Spring Catalyst has launched its business team optimization services designed to enhance human performance in the age of artificial intelligence. The launch was announced today, showcasing the company's mission to elevate human excellence in the workplace.

news.headline: Ubisoft releases Assassin’s Creed® Shadows, set in feudal Japan, available on multiple platforms globally.
news.summary: Today, Ubisoft unveiled that Assassin’s Creed® Shadows, the latest installment in the popular Assassin’s Creed series, has been launched globally. The game can be accessed on multiple platforms including Ubisoft+, PlayStation®5, Xbox Series X|S, Amazon Luna, Macs using Apple silicon through the Mac App Store, and Windows PC through Ubisoft Store, Steam, and the Epic Games Store. Moreover, the game has been confirmed as Steam Deck verified. Developed by Ubisoft Québec, the well-known studio responsible for Assassin’s Creed, this new release is intended to captivate gamers worldwide.

news.headline: NTT DATA introduces Agentic AI Services for Hyperscaler AI, aiding in adoption and enhancing efficiencies.
news.summary: NTT DATA, a renowned global provider of digital business and technology solutions, unveiled its latest offering in London - the Agentic AI Services for Hyperscaler AI Technologies. This innovative suite is tailored to assist organizations in seamlessly embracing, constructing, overseeing, and expanding AI-driven agents. By leveraging these services, companies can enhance operational efficiencies, spark creativity, and elevate both employee and customer interactions. Ultimately, this solution aims to optimize the benefits derived from AI investments. The launch of this distinctive service responds to the increasing market need for agentic AI solutions.

news.headline: Buyback and updated voting rights figures disclosed, consolidating ownership with total shareholder backing.
WI 10 Yr TIPS yield about 1.93% before $18 billion auction
Chicken market projected to become $268.35 billion industry by 2033, up from $160 billion in 2024. Factors include rise of fast food, health consciousness, and plant-based alternatives.
news.summary: A recent report titled "Chicken Market Size and Share Analysis - Growth Trends and Forecast Report 2025-2033" is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com. The report highlights the projected growth of the Chicken Market, estimating a value of US$160.62 billion in 2024 to US$268.35 billion in 2033, reflecting a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 5.87% during the period 2025 to 2033. This growth is attributed to factors such as increasing global demand for affordable protein, a rise in health consciousness promoting lean meat consumption, the expansion of fast-food and quick-service restaurants, urbanization, and advancements in the sector.
